items.headline_en: Gpt 5 5 With Trusted Access For Cyber
items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Gpt 5 5 With Trusted Access For Cyber".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber published=Thu, 07 May 2026 13:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-with-trusted-access-for-cyber description=OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure. title=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT published=Thu, 07 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-trusted-contact-in-chatgpt description=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected.
diff_excerpt: +title=Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
+description=OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
title=Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
description=Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
+description=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected.
description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
-title=Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
-description=OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
title=New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
description=OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
-description=Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
